ITEM.name: Very Fast Acceleration Vial v1
ITEM.desc: An fast ultra-lightweight potion that forcibly accelerates 1seconds the metabolism. It has been licensed to sell by eliminating side effects. Maximum of 1 vial can be used per game. (consumable item)

ITEM.name: Very Fast Acceleration Vial v2
ITEM.desc: An fast ultra-lightweight potion that forcibly accelerates 2seconds the metabolism. It has been licensed to sell by eliminating side effects. Maximum of 2 vial can be used per game. (consumable item)
